problem id: 37d81990
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR SHL(4)

examples:
  00010100 -> 01101000
  10100000 -> 01000001
  10100110 -> 01101101
  01110100 -> 11101000
  11011110 -> 11111101
  01001101 -> 11011010
  01011110 -> 11111100
  00110101 -> 01111010
  00001011 -> 10110110
  00110110 -> 01101100

query: 10110101
predicted answer: 01111011
